creator: dan@obluda.cz
text:
> I think fvwm95 should be added to the CONFLICTS lines of fvwm2
> and fvwm2-devel

Not so easy, IMHO.

fvwm95 conflicts with fvwm2* when fvwm95 compiled with manual pages ONLY.

It can be recorded in fvwm95's Makefile easily, but I don't know how to 
record such conditional dependency within fvwm2*'s Makefile

Dan
